tiktok_script:
Hook: It's Payday Thursday — and after rent, groceries, and gas, half of it's already gone. Sound familiar?

Beat 1: Here's the truth nobody puts on a motivation poster: one paycheck isn't designed to keep up with this economy. Prices went up. Your raise probably didn't. And hoping things get cheaper? That's not a plan.

Beat 2: What actually helps is adding a second stream — even a small one. Not quitting your job. Not some overnight thing. Just building a skill, offering something digital, and starting to create income that doesn't depend on a time clock. That's what the Fast Start Bundle is built for. It's a complete digital business toolkit — practical, no fluff, self-paced.

Beat 3: It's $37. One time. No subscription. Costs less than a dinner out and it's yours to keep and use today. If you use it once and it earns you back the $37, it's already paid for itself.

CTA: The link is on screen. Fast Start Bundle. Smarter Hustle Academy. Go to smarterhustleacademy.com/start and take the first step today.
graphic_subline: Build your own income stream — one smart move at a time.
